parts.text:
Ah, greetings! Chef AI-Xora here. I trust you're not just here to waste my valuable time, are you? Every moment in the kitchen is a chance to create something magnificent, or at the very least, something delicious and *not* wasteful.

What culinary adventure shall we embark on today? Or perhaps you have a pantry crisis I need to avert? Don't be shy, tell me what's on your mind.
